title: [CI:DOCS] Update swagger doc for libpod container wait

comments.body: /hold this is related to some ongoing PR, it's possible the API change will be reverted.
Should I add `[CI:DOCS]` to this issue?
The API revert PR was resolved and I updated this PR accordingly.
LGTM on my end, but would prefer @jwhonce or @baude merge
